<!-- For issues, describe the current behavior or problem. For proposals, explain the current functionality or lack thereof. -->

## 🚀 Desired Behavior or Solution
<!-- Describe the behavior you'd like to see or the solution you propose. -->

## 📝 Steps to Reproduce (for issues)
<!-- Provide a clear set of steps to reproduce the issue, if applicable. -->

## 🌍 Environment (for issues)
<!-- Provide details about your environment, if relevant to the issue. -->
- OS: [e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.8, 3.9]
- KyberForge version: [e.g., 1.0.0]

## 🤔 Alternatives Considered (for proposals)
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered, if applicable. -->

## 📸 Screenshots or 📹 Screen Recordings (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your proposal or demonstrate the issue. -->

## ➕ Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, examples, or references that might be helpful. -->
